docket_entries.description: DECLARATION OF APPEARANCE ON BEHALF OF CORPORATION PURSUANT TO CCP 116.540 (B)-(H) DAVE MORRIS FILED BY PLAINTIFF 2016 PACIFIC AVENUE CONDOMINIUM ASSOCIATION

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF 2016 PACIFIC AVENUE CONDOMINIUM ASSOCIATION IS NOT OWED ANY MONEY BY DEFENDANT B & B LOCKSMITH AND SECURITY, INC. STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS NO EXHIBITS FILED

MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $4,509.81 FILED BY 2016 PACIFIC AVENUE CONDOMINIUM ASSOCIATION AS TO DEFENDANT B & B LOCKSMITH AND SECURITY, INC. ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR MAR-16-2026 AT 05:30 PM IN DEPT 506
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF MAR-16-2026 - JUDGMENT.
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF SERVED JAN-15-2026, SUBSTITUTE SERVICE ON CORPORATION, NO SERVICE FEE AS TO DEFENDANT B & B LOCKSMITH AND SECURITY, INC.

SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF MAR-16-2026 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF MAR-16-2026 BY VISITING JUDGE JOSH FREDRICKS. APPEARANCES: PLAINTIFF 2016 PACIFIC AVENUE CONDOMINIUM ASSOCIATION IS PRESENT; APPEARING IN COURT IS DAVE MORRIS. DEFENDANT B & B LOCKSMITH AND SECURITY, INC IS PRESENT, APPEARING IN COURT IS OLEG BERGER. CLERK: M. DE LUNA. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. NOT REPORTED. (D506)
DECLARATION OF APPEARANCE ON BEHALF OF CORPORATION PURSUANT TO CCP 116.540 (B)-(H) OLEG ALEX BERGER FILED BY DEFENDANT B & B LOCKSMITH AND SECURITY, INC.
